description: Computes and frames API RP 754 process-safety performance indicators: Tier-1 and Tier-2 Process Safety Event (PSE) counts and normalized rates, and Tier-3/Tier-4 leading indicators. Counting is structured from the user's event facts (never invented); the rate uses the fail-loud denominator discipline (a missing or zero hours denominator is [GAP], never a fabricated figure). Distinct from the occupational TRIR/LTIFR/DART family. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: process-safety-kpi
